positive: A minimalist, highly detailed vector illustration of a majestic, stylized fox sitting gracefully amidst whimsical, oversized floral elements and forest foliage. The fox should be depicted in a clean silhouette style with intricate line work, giving it a sophisticated, ethereal look. The color palette must use deep indigo, burnt orange, moss green, and creamy off-white. Composition should be centrally focused, utilizing strong negative space for maximum impact on fabric. The style should blend Art Nouveau elegance with modern kawaii simplicity. Highly vector-graphic, studio lighting, perfect symmetry, pop art print quality, suitable for apparel transfer.
